title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at SAIL

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at SAIL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, SAIL in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SAIL:
SAIL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
